notes: This package is currently a reservation stub: doc.go declares the package and its future purpose.
Neo4j-specific driver and session adapters live in cmd/ wiring files (e.g. cmd/ingester/wiring_neo4j_executor.go, cmd/reducer/neo4j_wiring.go).
The runtime command wiring implements cypher.Executor directly against the neo4j-go-driver; that boundary is being narrowed toward this package.
No production code currently lives here beyond the doc.go package declaration.
No callers import this package in non-test, non-cmd code; runtime tests reference the README path via a test fixture.
